title: Qilin Ransomware Containment
subtitle: Advanced ransomware response from detection through containment and recovery

steps.title: Compromised VPN Credential
steps.description: Attacker gains access via stolen VPN credentials purchased from initial access broker.

steps.title: Network Reconnaissance
steps.description: Attacker enumerates network shares, domain controllers, and backup infrastructure.

steps.title: Chrome Credential Harvesting
steps.description: Deploy GPO-based PowerShell to harvest Chrome stored credentials across domain.

steps.title: SMB Propagation
steps.description: Use harvested credentials to spread across network via SMB admin shares.

steps.title: Lateral Movement Alert
steps.description: Sentinel detects anomalous SMB connection burst from single source host.

steps.title: Anti-Recovery Preparation
steps.description: Delete VSS snapshots, stop backup services, disable Windows recovery.

steps.title: VSS Deletion Alert
steps.description: Sigma and Wazuh rules detect shadow copy deletion and service stops.

steps.title: Ransomware Deployment
steps.description: Deploy Qilin encryptor — 2,847 files encrypted in 3 minutes.

steps.title: Automated Containment
steps.description: CLAW playbook auto-triggers: network isolate, kill processes, block SMB.

steps.title: Damage Assessment & Restore
steps.description: Assess encryption scope, verify backup integrity, initiate restoration.
